positive: Minimalist abstract creature silhouette, a celestial fox spirit with flowing astral tails, emerging from a vibrant nebular cloud backdrop. The fox should be rendered in deep midnight blue and glowing ethereal silver lines, contrasting sharply against a cosmic gradient of lavender, indigo, and teal. Composition must be perfectly centered, occupying 60% of the space, giving room for text placement. Focus on sharp, clean lines and high contrast. Geometric overlays of small, glowing constellations should frame the subject. Vector illustration quality, perfect symmetry, deep focus, cinematic lighting, print-ready quality, high detail, clean lines, solid color blocking, kawaii aesthetic, sticker design, highly stylized, --ar 1:1
